t_ch: 空间站是弹性工作制，现在就是我的私人时间，请你不要来说三道四。
t_en: The space station observes a flexible working-hour scheme. It is now my private time, so please don't accuse me of anything.

t_ch: 嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
t_en: Heh heh, my Ms. Daiqing~

t_ch: 是我的才对！……你，你别学我说话啊喂！
t_en: She's mine! You... don't you dare go around mimicking my speech!

t_ch: 你要是在这里跟我一起发癫，旁人看着会很奇怪的。
t_en: If you're pulling the same crazy stunt that I do, other people might think we're weird.

t_ch: 拉、拉黑了？
t_en: I—I'm blocked?

t_ch: 这才给了多少钱，难道说对一个诈骗犯来说，这很多吗？
t_en: How much did I transfer... Is that a lot for a scammer?

t_ch: 不多呀。
t_en: That's not a lot.

t_ch: 对呀。
t_en: I thought so.

t_ch: 她可能怀疑我才是骗子。
t_en: She might be suspecting I'm the scammer.

t_ch: 也是，正常人看到这样的数目可能很难相信自己的眼睛。
t_en: Good point. It might be difficult for regular people to believe a sum of money that large.

t_ch: 你把对面吓着了。
t_en: You scared her.

t_ch: 这就吓着了，心理承受能力还挺低的。
t_en: She's scared with only this much? What a doormat.

t_ch: 你别担心，像这样数目的金额，一般会通过星际和平公司的金融安全账户暂存后才会正式转账。
t_en: Don't worry, with this amount of money, it will usually go through the IPC's currency safety account for safekeeping for a time before it's officially transferred.

t_ch: 那么接下来，要做的可就简单了。麻烦{NICKNAME}联系地衡司调查取证、追回款项了。
t_en: So now, the easy part. {NICKNAME}, can you contact the Realm-Keeping Commission to file a report, launch an investigation, and retrieve the money?

t_ch: 我去跟温符瑞科员聊聊，让他头脑清醒清醒，看看「美丽狐仙聊天」这种低级骗术到底是怎么一回事。
t_en: I will go chat with Wen Furui and talk some sense into him. I'll teach him about the rudimentary scamming technique that the Foxian Beauty Chat employs.

t_ch: 啊，又有人来联系你了。
t_en: Oh, look, someone else is contacting you.

t_ch: 啊，还有这样的展开？
t_en: Ah, the plot thickens.

t_ch: 不过，如果她真的存在经纪人，为什么是用「她自己的小号」来联系你呢？
t_en: But, if she does have a manager, why would she use her own alias to contact you?

t_ch: 通常来说，这样的事情发生了之后，经纪人会比她本人更应该来处理这些事情。
t_en: Normally, when things like this happened, her manager would be on the ball to deal with hiccups like this.

t_ch: 也许她没有告诉经纪人。
t_en: Maybe she didn't tell her manager.

t_ch: 没有告诉经纪人，这样的说法也不是不成立，不过理由又是什么呢？
t_en: Not telling her manager isn't completely unbelievable, but why?

t_ch: 也许是她自己良心发现了。
t_en: Her conscience, maybe?

t_ch: 良心发现…不能骗你的钱，想趁着上层不知道，把钱还给你。
t_en: Her conscience... telling her not to cheat you out of your money and trying to return your money to you without the higher-up knowing.

t_ch: 那还真是善良呵。
t_en: What kindness.

t_ch: 也许她就是经纪人。
t_en: Maybe she's the manager herself.

t_ch: 啊这…你不是说那经纪人是个男的吗？
t_en: Uh... didn't you say the manager was male?

t_ch: …会不会对温符瑞科员来说有些太残忍了。
t_en: ...Wouldn't this be a little too cruel to Researcher Wen?

t_ch: 要不，你去与她碰面之前，去找经纪人打听一下，我觉得这样做会比较保险。找得到就问问，找不到就算了，也不麻烦。
t_en: Here's an idea. What if you go and meet up with the manager before meeting her? I think that might be safer. If you can find him, ask about her, and if you can't, just forget about it. It's not that big of a deal.

t_ch: 站住，你们是干什么的？
t_en: Halt, what are you doing here?

t_ch: 我们是来找人的。
t_en: We're here to meet someone.

t_ch: 对对对，我们是来找一位知心网友，在这个地方碰面。
t_en: That's right, we're here to meet an online friend. We agreed to meet up here.

t_ch: 我们没有做什么坏事。
t_en: We didn't do anything wrong.

t_ch: 没错，我们只是和网友线下见面而已，不是什么亏心事，哈哈哈。
t_en: That's right, we're just meeting someone we know online here. It's not something to feel guilty about, haha haha...

t_ch: 那我再问一个问题，你们两个谁是{NICKNAME}？
t_en: I'll ask you another question, which one of you is {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 就是你{F#这小丫头}{M#小子}啊。
t_en: So, you're the one.

t_ch: 她是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: She's {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 啊，你在说什么呀…云骑军大哥哥，{F#她}{M#他}才是。
t_en: Wait, wha— Mr. Cloud Knight, {F#she}{M#he} is.

t_ch: 就是你{F#这小丫头}{M#小子}啊。
t_en: So, you're the one.

t_ch: 为什么会知道这个名字？
t_en: How do you know this name?

t_ch: 啊，这个反应…你们其中一个人就是，对吧？
t_en: Hm, your response suggests that one of you is the one I'm looking for, right?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}涉嫌违法诈骗活动，我们将立即执行逮捕，全部涉案人员不许反抗，违抗者将直接暴力逮捕。
t_en: {NICKNAME} is suspected of illegal and fraudulent activities. We will carry out the arrest immediately. All persons involved in the case are advised not to resist arrest, and those who disobey will be arrested with violence if required.

t_ch: 啊？诈骗、逮捕、这都哪儿跟哪儿啊？
t_en: What, fraud, arrest, what is this?

t_ch: 你们抓错人了吧。
t_en: You have the wrong people.

t_ch: 对啊，我们怎么可能诈骗，要诈骗肯定也是对面的狐人在诈骗。
t_en: That's right! How would we be defrauding people? If anyone, it has to be the foxian who's out there scamming people.

t_ch: 有诈骗的事不否认是吧？
t_en: So, you're not denying a fraud has happened.

t_ch: 这云骑军是有问题的。
t_en: This Cloud Knight is suspicious.

t_ch: 云骑军有问题？不会吧。
t_en: The Cloud Knights, suspicious? It can't be.

t_ch: …你现在开始怀疑公职人员了吧。
t_en: ...And now you're defaming a public official.

t_ch: 给我全部拿下。
t_en: Arrest 'em all.

t_ch: 这件事儿跟我无关啊，我可以回家了吗……
t_en: I have nothing to do with this, can I go home now...?

t_ch: 怎么回事，情报上没有说过这几个人有这么强啊？快给我上。
t_en: What is this, why was there no mention of these people being so strong in the intel? At once, go!

t_ch: 这云骑老哥看上去好像不太对啊。
t_en: Something's wrong with this Cloud Knight captain.

t_ch: 啊，全让他们给跑了…他们真的是云骑军？
t_en: Agh, they ran away... Are they really Cloud Knights?

t_ch: 很显然不是。
t_en: Obviously not.

t_ch: 这是设计好的陷阱。
t_en: This is a calculated trap.

t_ch: 这个地址只有她才知道的，所以她安排了人手假扮云骑军在这里埋伏你。
t_en: Only she would know of this address, so she must have arranged for people to ambush you as Cloud Knights.

t_ch: 我们都已经到地点了，她还没出现，看来是做贼心虚了。你给她发下信息吧，就说「阿青，你根本就不在流云渡，你躲哪去了」。
t_en: We're here at the location, but she didn't appear. I think she might be feeling guilty. Send her a message and say, "Qingster, you're not at Cloudford at all, where are you?"

t_ch: （发送消息）
t_en: (Message sent)

t_ch: 等等，我好像听到了玉兆的消息提示音，就在前面的集装箱那里。
t_en: Wait, I think I heard a jade abacus notification coming from the container in front.

t_ch: 走，我们去看看。
t_en: Let's go check it out.

t_ch: 阿青，你别躲在里面不出声，我知道你在里面。
t_en: Qingster, don't just hide and be quiet, I know you're in there.

t_ch: 你有本事骗钱，怎么没有本事开门啊。
t_en: You have the guts to pull off scams but not open a door?

t_ch: 我出来，我出来还不行吗？
t_en: ...Alright, alright, I'll come out. Satisfied?

t_ch: 你就是狐仙啊？
t_en: Are you the foxian beauty?

t_ch: 不会吧，我是不是认错人了？再仔细看看的话，好像是上次遇到的那个经纪人……
t_en: It can't be, did I get the wrong person? Lemme look closer... Mm, kinda looks like the manager I saw last time...

t_ch: 就是就是，我怎么可能是「狐仙黛青」嘛。我不是狐人，甚至不是女子。
t_en: Yeah, that's right. How could I be the Foxian Beauty Daiqing? I'm not foxian. I'm not even a lady.

t_ch: 我…我是经纪人。
t_en: I... I am her manager.

t_ch: 所以是你一直在跟我聊天吗？
t_en: So it was you talking to me this whole time?

t_ch: 不是我，那是黛青……
t_en: That's not me, that's Daiqing...

t_ch: 那玉兆在你手上，黛青又在哪里呢？
t_en: But the jade abacus is in your hand, so where is Daiqing?

t_ch: 她、她…算了，我也不演了，我就是黛青。
t_en: She... She... Oh, darn it. I'll drop the act. I am Daiqing.

t_ch: 其实你就是黛青吧。
t_en: You are Daiqing, aren't you?

t_ch: …你怎么会这样想呢？
t_en: ...Why would you think that?

t_ch: 那到底是谁拿着你手上的玉兆给我们回信息呢？
t_en: So who's the one holding the jade abacus in your hand, replying to our messages?

t_ch: …算了，我也不演了，我就是黛青。
t_en: ...Fine, I'll drop the act. I am Daiqing.

t_ch: 我早就察觉到你是来调查我的，但是我没想到…你有这么多钱，还这么能打。
t_en: I had a feeling from the start that you were sent to investigate me, but I didn't think... that you would have so much money, and that you were so capable of fighting.

t_ch: 现在你知道了，我确实是一直在假扮美丽狐仙在网络上与人聊天，但是我没有做什么亏心事！
t_en: Well, now you know, I have been catfishing as a foxian beauty to chat with people online, but I have done nothing that goes against my conscience!

t_ch: 真的吗？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 你骗了我不止一次。
t_en: You lied to me more than once.

t_ch: 我从一开始不该骗你说「我是经纪人」，但那也没有办法的事。
t_en: I shouldn't have told you that I was her manager, but what would you have me do?

t_ch: 很多人都信任着「狐仙黛青」，你们要是出去告诉别人，「狐仙黛青」其实是躲在集装箱里的大汉……
t_en: So many people have been believing the fantasy of the Foxian Beauty Daiqing. If you go out there and tell them the Foxian Beauty Daiqing is actually a dude hiding in a container...

t_ch: 我可不敢对我的牌友们这么说。
t_en: I wouldn't tell my game mates that.

t_ch: 对吧？在当时那个情景里，我也不认识你们，我只好假装自己是经纪人。
t_en: Isn't it? In a situation like just now, and the fact that I don't know any of you, I can only pretend to be Daiqing's manager.

t_ch: 但是你一开始为什么要伪装？
t_en: But why are you catfishing in the first place?

t_ch: 你不会告诉我，你真的只是想聊天，没有其他的企图，比如骗钱什么的？
t_en: You won't tell me you're really just trying to make friends with people online and have no ulterior motives, such as cheating people's money or anything like that, will you?

t_ch: 你骗钱的时候还挺熟练的呀。
t_en: You seemed like you've done this a lot.

t_ch: 对啊，聊天记录我看了，装作楚楚可怜的女孩子，让人泛起同情心之后，就想卖出高价茶叶，这不是诈骗是什么？
t_en: That's right, I had a look at the chat records. Your M.O. is to pretend to be a pitiful lady, evoking sympathy, before selling them some expensive tea leaves. What is that if not a scam?

t_ch: …其实我是怀疑你在调查我，只是想反过来威胁你…但现在说什么都晚了。
t_en: ...I was suspecting you were investigating me, so I just wanted to scare you a little... But it's too late now to say anything that will change your mind.

t_ch: 我就直说吧，你会愿意和一个陌生的、相貌平平的男子交心吗？
t_en: I'll be upfront. Would you want to befriend a stranger, and an average-looking man at that?

t_ch: 有点难度。
t_en: Not really, no.

t_ch: 也不是不可以。
t_en: I won't say no outright.

t_ch: 你真是一个怪人，其他人可就不一定这样想了。
t_en: You're weird, not everyone will think like you.

t_ch: 这就是我扮演成狐人女子的理由了，你在网络上肯定也见过不少。
t_en: This is exactly the reason I catfish as a foxian lady. You must have seen plenty online.

t_ch: 我承认我确实骗过钱，不过对我来说，用三言两语就能给别人帮助，这样的快乐金钱根本比不了，你肯定很难理解吧？
t_en: I'll admit, I have cheated some people out of their money. But to me, if I can help another with just a few words, the money is inconsequential to the joy they'd feel, wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: …我的牌友给我发消息了，希望我们能谈谈，让我们「马上」过去。
t_en: ...My game mates just sent me a message. They want to talk, so they hope we will get there IMMEDIATELY.

t_ch: 我跑不了的，就待在这里。求求你，别告诉他「狐仙黛青」的真相。
t_en: I have nowhere to go. I'll be right here. Please, don't tell them the truth about the Foxian Beauty Daiqing.

t_ch: 你放心，我不会说的。
t_en: Don't worry, I won't say anything.

t_ch: 不行，他们应该知道真相。
t_en: No, they should know the truth.

t_ch: 我这人嘴不牢，别指望我。
t_en: My lips are pretty loose, so don't keep your hopes up.

t_ch: 走吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 你怎么背对着我们呀，黛青就在……
t_en: Why do you have your backs turned against us? Daiqing is over...

t_ch: 黛青小姐姐就在那个转角对吧？我不能转过去，我不能见到她本人。
t_en: Ms. Daiqing is over around that corner, isn't she? I shouldn't look over there. I shouldn't see her true self.

t_ch: 她是「孤身一人住在远离尘世的地方」，我一旦和她这样见面了，就会、就会不太合适……
t_en: She's someone who "stays alone at a far-off location." Meeting her like this doesn't seem appropriate...

t_ch: 所以，你不是来见狐仙，是想做什么？
t_en: So, if you're not here to see the foxian beauty. What are you doing here?

t_ch: …地衡司的条子，你是不是想以「赛博诈骗」为理由逮捕黛青小姐姐?
t_en: ...Realm-Keeping Commission's spy, are you going to arrest Ms. Daiqing under the pretext of "cyber fraud"?

t_ch: 是啊，涉案金额已经过亿了。
t_en: Yeah, the money involved has exceeded one hundred million credits.

t_ch: 怎么会，这是真的吗…我不相信。
t_en: How could this be... Is it true? I can't believe it.

t_ch: 我不是地衡司的条子。
t_en: I'm not a spy from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 那你肯定是想去地衡司报案吧！
t_en: So you must be going to the Realm-Keeping Commission to report her!

t_ch: 我没有这个打算。
t_en: I have no such plans.

t_ch: 你只是口头上在糊弄我，我知道。
t_en: You're just saying what I want to hear, I know.

t_ch: 听着，对我们来说，「狐仙黛青」不是一个聊天室账号，那是我们和拐角里那个人，一起打造的幻想。
t_en: Look, to us, Foxian Beauty Daiqing is not just an account on a chatroom. It is a fantasy that we created with the person around that corner.

t_ch: 你低估了她给我的帮助！
t_en: You underestimated the help she has given me!

t_ch: 我曾经有过轻生的念头，是黛青不厌其烦地关心我的精神状态、联系上了我的朋友来帮助我，是她让我觉得自己好像也能努力地活下去。
t_en: I have had thoughts of ending it all. It was Daiqing who kept my spirits strong and contacted my friends to help me. It was her who make me feel like I can continue living.

t_ch: …但是，这个。
t_en: But this...

t_ch: 「狐仙聊天就是用花言巧语骗取钱财」…我心里也很清楚，她想要钱，我想要她的甜言蜜语。她每次都想把钱退给我，但是我觉得这是她应得的报酬。
t_en: "The Foxian Beauty Chat sweet-talks people into spending their money..." I know that. She wants money, and I want her soothing words. She wanted to return the money to me every time, but I felt like that was a remuneration she deserves.

t_ch: 她拥有抚慰人心的力量，这些钱她应该拿着。所以她要是因此定罪，我会愧疚的。
t_en: She has the power to ease people's hearts, so she should be able to earn that money with the work that she does. If she is going to be judged because of that, I'd feel guilty.

t_ch: …我是不感兴趣啦，但是这位{F#姑娘}{M#兄弟}可是被诈骗了很多钱。
t_en: ...It doesn't concern me much, but this {F#lady}{M#man} has been scammed out of a huge amount of money.

t_ch: 我们不会和她见面的，现在要回去了。
t_en: We won't be meeting her, so we're going home.

t_ch: 算是我求你了，不要让她被地衡司抓走了。
t_en: I'm begging you, please don't let her be taken away by the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 她不会被抓走的。
t_en: She won't be arrested.

t_ch: 这不是我来决定的。
t_en: This is not something I can decide.

t_ch: 她必须被抓走。
t_en: She must be apprehended.

t_ch: 我就在这里。能问一下，你们聊了什么吗？
t_en: I'm here. Can I inquire as to what you talked about?

t_ch: 我的牌友们为了你在向{F#她}{M#他}求情，不希望你被地衡司抓走。
t_en: My game mates are begging {F#her}{M#him} on your behalf. They don't want you to be taken into custody by the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: …你会怎么做呢？
t_en: ...What will you do?

t_ch: 带着你去地衡司投案自首。
t_en: I will escort you to the Realm-Keeping Commission to surrender yourself.

t_ch: 没错，犯罪就是犯罪，不管你有没有还回去，骗取他人钱财已经是越线了。
t_en: That's right, a crime is a crime, whether you return the money or not. Cheating someone out of their money is already crossing the line.

t_ch: 我不会揭露你的真实身份。
t_en: I won't reveal your true identity.

t_ch: 真的可以这样吗？
t_en: Can you really do that?

t_ch: 前提是把所有钱都还回去。
t_en: Provided that all the money is returned.

t_ch: 没有问题，这个你放心，包括你的巨资，我全部都会还回去。
t_en: No problem, don't worry, I will return everything, including your massive sum.

t_ch: 但是你必须停止继续角色扮演。
t_en: But you have to stop this role-playing act.

t_ch: 你要我告诉他们「狐仙黛青」是假的，其实我是躲在集装箱里的大汉吗？
t_en: You want me to tell them that the Foxian Beauty Daiqing is fake, and that I'm actually just a dude who hides in a container?

t_ch: 我办不到，我宁愿你把我抓起来，而不是公开这些「无聊的真相」。
t_en: I can't do it. I'd rather you arrest me and not reveal the "boring truth."

t_ch: 难道他们只是喜欢这层幻象吗？
t_en: Do they really only like this facade that you put up?

t_ch: 是啊，你们已经心灵相通了，这和外貌性别没有关系。
t_en: That's right, you have already spilled your soul to each other, this has nothing to do with your physical appearance or gender identity.

t_ch: 我很怀疑这样的决定，但既然你要求了，我试试吧。
t_en: I highly doubt this decision, but since you insisted it, I'll try.

t_ch: 时代变了，大汉也会受欢迎的。
t_en: Time has changed, even a dude like you can be popular.

t_ch: 是啊，网络上有很多大叔装成美少女的，大家心知肚明，这很常见。
t_en: That's right, there are so many middle-aged men pretending to be young and pretty girls online. This is so common that people don't think much of it anymore.

t_ch: 是这样的吗…但既然你要求了，我试试吧。
t_en: Is that so...? Since you insisted, I'll give it a try.

t_ch: 黛青帮了很多人，应该继续。
t_en: Daiqing has helped a lot of people, there's no harm in letting him continue.

t_ch: 真的吗？
t_en: Really?

t_ch: 谢谢你，我也想作为「狐仙黛青」继续这样下去，但是我绝对不会再骗取任何钱财了，我向你保证。
t_en: Thank you. I also want to continue as the Foxian Beauty Daiqing, but I will not ask people for money anymore, I guarantee you that.

t_ch: 光是保证没有用，我们会监督你的…等等，这听上去有很多工作量，{F#她}{M#他}会监督你的。
t_en: Guarantees mean nothing, we will keep our eyes on you... Wait, this sounds like a huge workload, {F#she}{M#he} will keep watch on you.

t_ch: 没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: …啊，对了，别忘了你买茶钱，我必须还给你。你要的茶叶太多了，我根本给不了，请接受我的退款。
t_en: ...Oh right, don't forget the money you paid to buy the tea leaves. The tea you paid for is too much, there's no way I can provide that much to you, so please accept my refund.

t_ch: 你们将他带到地衡司自首，地衡司严谨地处理了「美丽狐仙聊天」的案件。
t_en: You take him to turn himself in at the Realm-Keeping Commission. The Commission took the case seriously and processed the case of the Foxian Beauty Chat.

t_ch: 随后，地衡司将赛博诈骗的案件公示，各种各样的受害者得到了相应的赔偿。
t_en: Later on, the Realm-Keeping Commission publically released information about the cyber fraud cases, and various victims received appropriate compensation.

t_ch: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
t_en: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

t_ch: 你们离开了流云渡，随后不久「狐仙黛青」向所有人公布了自己的真实身份。
t_en: You leave Cloudford. Not long after, Foxian Beauty Daiqing announces his true identity to everyone.

t_ch: 根据青雀牌友的说法，有不少人选择不再关注黛青，还有一些人留了下来。
t_en: According to Qingque's game mates, some followers chose not to follow Daiqing any longer, while some continued.

t_ch: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
t_en: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

t_ch: 你们离开了流云渡，撤销了金融安全调查后，「狐仙黛青」再次恢复了活动。
t_en: You leave Cloudford. After the financial security investigation was called off, Foxian Beauty Daiqing soon resumed online activity.

t_ch: 根据青雀牌友的说法，「狐仙黛青」的温柔一如过去，就像没有发生过波澜。
t_en: According to Qingque's game mates, Foxian Beauty Daiqing is as gentle as she used to be, as if nothing has ever happened.

t_ch: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
t_en: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

t_ch: 我们不是仙舟法律，这些事情交给地衡司来判断吧。
t_en: We are not the law of the Xianzhou, so let's leave the judgment to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 我明白了，就按你们说的做。
t_en: I understand, I'll do whatever you think is correct.

t_ch: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…温符瑞你还好吗？
t_en: So, he's not foxian, and he's not a beauty... Are you okay, Wen Furui?

t_ch: 谢谢你，及时告诉了我真相。这种骗子就应该早点吃牢饭。
t_en: Thank you for telling me the truth in time. Scammers like this should all go to jail.

t_ch: 我还以为你肯定会很伤心呢，没想到你恢复得这么快。
t_en: I thought you'd be more depressed than what you seem to be right now. I didn't think you'd bounce back so quickly.

t_ch: 所以，我其实没有受伤，我只会喜欢真正的狐人，这种假狐人是骗不了我的。
t_en: I don't actually feel hurt. I only like real foxian people, fake foxians like him will never fool me.

t_ch: 你明明被骗得团团转。
t_en: The wool was not just pulled over your eyes, it was all around your head.

t_ch: 对啊，每天都对着狐人照片发癫，有好几个科员向我投诉了。
t_en: That's right. For days, you had been going crazy over the foxian's picture. Some of your colleagues even complained.

t_ch: 真狐人就可以骗你了吗？
t_en: So can real foxians deceive you?

t_ch: 要是真的美丽狐仙，当然可以骗我，这有什么问题吗？
t_en: If they were true foxian beauties, of course they can trick me. Is there a problem with that?

t_ch: 哎…你这外驻申请，我还得再考虑考虑。
t_en: Um... I may have to reconsider your off-station transfer application.

t_ch: 别呀。
t_en: Please don't.

t_ch: 对了，他不是美丽狐仙，那这照片上又是谁呀？
t_en: Speaking of, if he's not a pretty foxian, then who is this in the photo?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}手机上的照片不就是一般的狐人姑娘吗，估计是随便找了个路人吧。
t_en: Isn't the photo on {NICKNAME}'s phone just a regular foxian lady? Maybe the scammer chose a passing foxian girl at random.

t_ch: 仙舟上到处都是这样的狐人姐姐、狐人妹妹吗？
t_en: Are you saying foxian ladies like this are everywhere on Xianzhou?

t_ch: 我觉得你有问题。
t_en: I think you have a problem.

t_ch: 仙舟就是这样的地方。
t_en: Xianzhou is, in fact, a place like this.

t_ch: 艾丝妲代理站长，我认为我们还是应该加强和仙舟方面的科研技术合作！
t_en: Acting Lead Researcher Asta, I think we should strengthen our cooperative relationship in research technology with Xianzhou!

t_ch: 行了行了，你先回去写外驻申请吧，在那之后我们再做决定。
t_en: Fine, fine. Go ahead and write me an off-station transfer application, and we'll see.

t_ch: 好嘞！
t_en: Ya-hoo!

t_ch: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
t_en: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

t_ch: …我已经向罗浮仙舟的司辰宫发送了学术交流的申请，你不要着急。反倒是你，你这外驻申请写得完全不像样，我建议你再回去修改修改。
t_en: ...I've already sent the request for academic exchange to the Palace of Astrum on the Xianzhou Luofu, so don't you worry. You, on the other hand, your transfer application is so messily written, I have to ask you to rewrite and edit it before submitting again.

t_ch: 可是，我已经改了好几版了……
t_en: But, I've already rewritten it a few times...

t_ch: 啊，你来了，我拜托你调查的事情进展如何？
t_en: Oh, you're here. How goes the thing I asked you to investigate?

t_ch: （完整讲述狐仙黛青的真相）
t_en: (Recount the whole story about Foxian Beauty Daiqing)

t_ch: （那是…太卜司的青雀，难道说她也对「美丽狐仙聊天」感兴趣…）
t_en: (That's... Qingque from the Divination Commission. Could she also be interested in the Foxian Beauty Chat...)

t_ch: 机巧鸟要进入航道了，接下来只能坐星槎去追了。
t_en: The cycrane is entering the lane as we speak. The only way to keep up with it is with a starskiff.

t_ch: 走吧，追上去。
t_en: The chase is on, then.

t_ch: 「我是地衡司执事，给我追上前面那只机巧鸟。」
t_en: "As an official of the Realm-Keeping Commission, I order you to follow that cycrane up ahead at all costs."

t_ch: …要是有机会说出这样的台词就好了！
t_en: ...If only I had the chance to issue an order like that!

t_ch: 我还有其他的事儿。
t_en: I have other matters to attend to.

t_ch: 啊，不会吧，可是…啊——
t_en: What? But the... ah—

t_ch: 我先追过去啦，你等会儿赶过来！
t_en: I'll go after it first, you can catch up in a bit!

t_ch: 机巧鸟在检货仓里停了一会儿，还带着你的礼物，看来目的地就在这流云渡里。
t_en: Looks like the cycrane has made its way to the Inspection Warehouse with your gift in tow. Its destination appears to be Cloudford.

t_ch: 走吧，我们赶紧追上去。
t_en: Let's get moving and keep up with it.

t_ch: 等等，站住，你是什么人？
t_en: Hey you, halt right there. Who might you be?

t_ch: 你、你们又是什么人，凭什么叫我站住？
t_en: Wh—Who do you guys think you are, ordering me around like this?

t_ch: 我们是鹤运物流的快递员。
t_en: We're delivery workers from Heron Express.

t_ch: 没错，我们怀疑你冒领他人快递。
t_en: Indeed, we suspect you of fraudulently claiming someone else's delivery.

t_ch: 嗨，这都是误会，都是误会啊…唉？鹤运物流哪有什么快递员啊？
t_en: Hey now, this is just a misunderstanding, you see? And since when does Heron Express have delivery people?

t_ch: 我是性格恶劣的劫匪。
t_en: I am a robber with a fearsome temperament to match.

t_ch: 劫、劫匪？！呔，光天化日，朗朗乾坤……
t_en: R—Robbers!? Strolling around in broad daylight, in a civilized age such as this...

t_ch: 咳，先说说你是干什么的吧。我身旁这位{F#女侠}{M#猛男}有着灵活多变的择业标准，你要是老实交代，{F#她}{M#他}也可以不是劫匪。
t_en: Ahem, let's start with what you do for a living. This {F#fearsome lady}{M#fearsome man} beside me is very flexible in their career choice, so if you answer honestly, {F#she}{M#he} might not be a robber.

t_ch: 我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 我们认识吗？不认识的话，那么就此别过？
t_en: Are we acquainted? If not, I suggest we bid each other farewell.

t_ch: 礼物是寄给黛青小姐姐的，「她孤身一人住在远离尘世的地方」。我们寄给她的礼物，怎么就落在你的手里了？
t_en: The gift we sent is for Ms. Daiqing, "who lives alone, away from the world." How exactly did it fall into your hands?

t_ch: 我、我…因为我是她的经纪人。反倒是你们，黛青多次表达了希望粉丝不要做出过激的行为，比如跟踪之类的……你们根本就没有听进去是吧，我要注销你们会员资格！
t_en: Because... because I am her manager. And you might be interested to know that Daiqing has repeatedly expressed her wish that fans not engage in extreme behaviors such as, for example, stalking. Are you guys even listening? I'm going to cancel your memberships!

t_ch: 我本来就没有会员资格。
t_en: I don't even have a membership.

t_ch: 我也没有会员，我们俩是追着别人的物流跟过来的。
t_en: I don't have a membership either. We both got here by following someone else's delivery.

t_ch: 你现在就给我老实交代，黛青小姐姐的礼物不会被你私吞了吧？
t_en: Now you give me an honest answer: You're not going to steal Ms. Daiqing's gift for yourself, right?

t_ch: 正面回答我们的问题！
t_en: Answer the question!

t_ch: 没错没错，这根本就不是给你的礼物，遮遮掩掩的，你难道想私吞了不成？
t_en: That's right, that's right, the gift isn't for you at all. Are you sneaking around like this because you're trying to take it for yourself?

t_ch: 我肯定会把礼物送到黛青小姐姐的手上，接下来的事儿，你们不用管。
t_en: Rest assured the gift will be delivered to Ms. Daiqing. As for how it gets to her, you needn't worry about that.

t_ch: 我们还没相信你是黛青小姐姐的经纪人呢，除非……
t_en: We won't believe that you're actually Ms. Daiqing's manager, unless...

t_ch: 你带我们去见她。
t_en: You take us to her.

t_ch: 没错！
t_en: That's right!

t_ch: 别做梦了，怎么能让你们打扰到她呢？
t_en: Are you guys out of your minds? How could I allow anyone to disturb Ms. Daiqing?

t_ch: 把会员资格送给我。
t_en: Grant me membership.

t_ch: 你能不能有点格局，我们现在就去见到本人！
t_en: Ugh, get with the program! What we really want is for you to take us to visit Ms. Daiqing.

t_ch: 别做梦了，怎么能让你们打扰到她呢？
t_en: Are you guys out of your minds? How could I allow anyone to disturb Ms. Daiqing?

t_ch: 那好啊，我就把你带到地衡司去，看看你到底是不是经纪人！
t_en: Is that so? How about I take you to the Realm-Keeping Commission and let them decide whether you're really Ms. Daiqing's manager?

t_ch: 别别别，我真是服了你了。这样吧，我会给你们比会员资格更高级的「高级会员资格」，可以和黛青小姐姐私联，怎么样？
t_en: No, no, no, that won't be necessary. How about this: I give you some even better than normal membership — premium membership — which will allow you to contact Ms. Daiqing privately. How's that sound?

t_ch: 可我还是想见到本人。
t_en: But what I really want is to see her in person.

t_ch: 你就知足吧，一般会员做梦也没有这样的资格。
t_en: Learn to recognize a blessing when you see it! Those with just normal membership could never dream of such a privilege.

t_ch: 好啊，成交。
t_en: Very well then. It's a deal.

t_ch: 我们还是去地衡司吧。
t_en: Maybe the Realm-Keeping Commission could help us sort things out.

t_ch: 得饶人处且饶人，就这个吧，我们别再吓着他了。
t_en: Let's cut the guy some slack and just leave it at this. No need to keep intimidating people.

t_ch: 今天可真晦气。来吧，这样就能证明我是她的经纪人了吧。
t_en: What a rotten day this has been. Here, this will also prove that I'm really her manager.

t_ch: 神秘的经纪人取得了你们的联系方式，随后，你们成功得到了「高级会员资格」。
t_en: The mysterious manager obtains your contact information, and you successfully obtain the "premium membership."

t_ch: 你们可千万别告诉其他人，如果暴露了，我就要取消你们的资格。
t_en: Let's keep this between us, alright? If any word of this gets out, I'll have to cancel your membership privileges.

t_ch: 那我们就不打扰了！
t_en: We'll leave you be, then!

t_ch: 其实我只想帮朋友搞到会员资格。这下可好，「高级会员资格」，有赚到。
t_en: Actually, I was just trying to help my friend get a membership. Never thought we'd be so lucky to get a premium membership.

t_ch: 得亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。不愧是让太卜另眼相看的人，一股身经百战的气质，用来虚张声势再合适不过了。
t_en: Good work, {NICKNAME}. As expected of someone who gets special recognition even from the Divination Commission, your battle-hardened aura couldn't be more fitting for this charade.

t_ch: 「身经百战」倒也没有…
t_en: "Battle-hardened" might be a bit of an exaggeration...

t_ch: 还好有你在旁边，光是我一个人要他紧张起来可不容易。
t_en: Without you by my side, I don't think I could've intimidated him into playing along with us.

t_ch: 「虚张声势」可不是什么好话…
t_en: Calling it a "charade" doesn't sound like a good thing...

t_ch: 嘿嘿，你懂我的意思就行。
t_en: Hehe, you know what I mean.

t_ch: 哎，瞧你的眼神，当时似乎还不打算放过那家伙？
t_en: Judging by the expression on your face, I'd reckon you weren't planning on letting him go so soon?

t_ch: 本来也许能挖出更多信息…
t_en: I thought maybe we could extract more information from him...

t_ch: 哦？你是怀疑这「狐仙聊天」背后还有什么猫腻是吧？
t_en: Oh? You suspect that there is something more to this "Foxian Beauty Chat," don't you?

t_ch: 这家伙一听地衡司脸都变了…
t_en: As soon as we mentioned the Realm-Keeping Commission, that guy's face changed completely...

t_ch: 是喽，这所谓的聊天业务多半是藏着什么猫腻喽。
t_en: Yes, there's something fishy about this so-called chat business.

t_ch: 我对这些不感兴趣。本来也只是输了一局，被这几个家伙抓来喊接头暗号。
t_en: I'm not interested in this sort of thing anyway. We've only lost round one, being forced to yell pass phrases by these fellas.

t_ch: 不过嘛，也不用急于一时。这当口抓他去地衡司不过是个小偷小摸的罪名。俗话说的好，「放长线，钓大鱼」。
t_en: In any case, there is no need to be hasty. Catching him now would only get him charged with the petty crime of thievery. As the saying goes, "If you want to catch a big fish, cast a long line."

t_ch: 嗨呀，跑来跑去还真是费劲啊，今天的运动量就到此为止了。{NICKNAME}，我先告辞啦。
t_en: Hey, running around everywhere takes a lot of energy, so that's enough exercise for today. {NICKNAME}, I'll see you later.

t_ch: 我还以为是谁呢，结果是地衡司的条子。
t_en: I thought it was someone else, but it turned out to be a spy from the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 啊，你果然也在这里，你也是来找经纪人讨说法的吗？
t_en: Ah, you're here too. Are you here to ask for an explanation from the manager too?

t_ch: 我们要讨什么说法？
t_en: What explanation?

t_ch: 你们为什么会在这里？
t_en: What are you doing here?

t_ch: 那个「狐仙黛青」的账号已经有好几天没有回复消息了，牌友们都觉得她肯定出了什么事情，比如赛博诈骗被抓了之类的……
t_en: That "Foxian Beauty Daiqing" account has not replied to any messages for several days. My game mates think some trouble must have befallen her, like being arrested by involving herself in a cyber fraud or something...

t_ch: 牌友们心急如焚、火急火燎，因为我之前见过经纪人，就押着我过来找人讨说法了。
t_en: My game mates are so anxious and fired up that they sent me to come and get an explanation.

t_ch: 那个经纪人绝对有问题，我们从没听说过黛青小姐姐有什么经纪人！
t_en: There's definitely something fishy going on. We've never heard of any manager for Ms. Daiqing!

t_ch: 你告诉了他们经纪人的位置？
t_en: You told them the location of the manager?

t_ch: 对呀，不然他们会一直问我。不过你来晚了，很显然经纪人也没在这附近。
t_en: Yup! Otherwise, they would have never stopped asking for it. But you're late, and obviously the manager isn't around here anymore.

t_ch: 其实我能找到黛青在哪里。
t_en: Actually, I have a way to find Daiqing.

t_ch: 真的吗，那个狐人姑娘也在流云渡吗…怎么都喜欢来码头啊？又不是什么警匪片。
t_en: Really, that foxian girl is also at Cloudford? Why would she go all the way out to the port? What is this, some kind of mafia movie?

t_ch: 带上我一起找吧，我看你比较靠谱，跟着你事情应该会顺利。
t_en: I'll go with you. You seem reliable, so things should go pretty smoothly.

t_ch: 我不相信这家伙的话…不过嘛，你们要是找到了，青雀小囡，记得联系我啊。
t_en: Qingque, I don't believe anything this fella says... But if you do find Ms. Daiqing, please let me know.

t_ch: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…温符瑞你还好吗？
t_en: So, he's not foxian, and he's not a beauty... Are you okay, Wen Furui?

t_ch: 我收到信息了，当时就把联系人删掉了。虽然他有说要给我退钱，但是我没有要，那些肮脏的信用点只会给我带来痛苦的回忆。
t_en: I got the message and deleted the contact right then and there. He did offer to give me a refund, but I didn't take it. Those dirty credits will only bring back painful memories.

t_ch: 这种事情非得要「美丽狐仙」自己讲出来吗？
t_en: Does this kind of thing have to be told by the "Foxian Beauty" herself?

t_ch: 重要的是内在，不是性别种族。
t_en: What matters is what's inside, not sex or ethnicity.

t_ch: 你这些话就说给自己听吧。
t_en: You can save those words for yourself.

t_ch: 在我知道「美丽狐仙」不是狐人的瞬间，就已经失去了所有的兴趣。
t_en: The moment I found out the "Foxian Beauty" was not even a foxian, I lost all interest.

t_ch: 不要在意他，你说的是对的。
t_en: You're right. Don't mind him.

t_ch: 真诚待人又有何不对？
t_en: What's wrong with being honest and sincere?

t_ch: 没错！尽早告诉才是对的，我要是去了仙舟费劲千辛万苦找到他……
t_en: That's right! It is only right to tell the truth as soon as possible. If I had gone through all the trouble of finding him in Xianzhou...

t_ch: 我不敢想，幸好我还没有出发。
t_en: Just thinking about it makes me shudder. Thankfully I hadn't set out yet.

t_ch: 从这个层面上来看，你确实做了一件好事。
t_en: So in that sense, you've really done a good thing.

t_ch: 对了，他不是美丽狐仙，那这照片上又是谁呀？
t_en: Speaking of, if he's not a pretty foxian, then who is this in the photo?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}手机上的照片不就是一般的狐人姑娘吗，估计是随便找了个路人吧。
t_en: Isn't the photo on {NICKNAME}'s phone just a regular foxian lady? Maybe the scammer chose a passing foxian girl at random.

t_ch: 仙舟上到处都是这样的狐人姐姐、狐人妹妹吗？
t_en: Are you saying foxian ladies like this are everywhere on Xianzhou?

t_ch: 我觉得你有问题。
t_en: I think you have a problem.

t_ch: 仙舟就是这样的地方。
t_en: Xianzhou is, in fact, a place like this.

t_ch: 艾丝妲代理站长，我认为我们还是应该加强和仙舟方面的科研技术合作！
t_en: Acting Lead Researcher Asta, I think we should strengthen our cooperative relationship in research technology with Xianzhou!

t_ch: 行了行了，你先回去写外驻申请吧，在那之后我们再做决定。
t_en: Fine, fine. Go ahead and write me an off-station transfer application, and we'll see.

t_ch: 好嘞！
t_en: Ya-hoo!

t_ch: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
t_en: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

t_ch: …我已经向罗浮仙舟的司辰宫发送了学术交流的申请，你不要着急。反倒是你，你这外驻申请写得完全不像样，我建议你再回去修改修改。
t_en: ...I've already sent the request for academic exchange to the Palace of Astrum on the Xianzhou Luofu, so don't you worry. You, on the other hand, your transfer application is so messily written, I have to ask you to rewrite and edit it before submitting again.

t_ch: 可是，我已经改了好几版了……
t_en: But, I've already rewritten it a few times...

t_ch: 啊，你来了，我拜托你调查的事情进展如何？
t_en: Oh, you're here. How goes the thing I asked you to investigate?

t_ch: （完整讲述狐仙黛青的真相）
t_en: (Recount the whole story about Foxian Beauty Daiqing)

t_ch: 嗯，结果他既不是狐仙，也不美丽…我得想想，到底该怎么温和地告诉温符瑞。
t_en: So it turns out the Foxian Beauty is neither foxian nor a beauty... I'm going to have to think of a way to break this news to Wen Furui.

t_ch: 你可不可以拜托那个「狐仙」拍个视频，大概内容就是「我们两人实在是不合适，请温符瑞忘记她」之类的。
t_en: Can you ask that "Foxian Beauty" to record a video for Wen Furui, where she says "I don't think the two of us make a good pair, please forget me forever," or something to that effect?

t_ch: 你可真是温柔。
t_en: That's very thoughtful of you.

t_ch: 我想了想，要是告诉他那根本不是美丽狐仙，他可能从此一蹶不振。
t_en: I'm afraid that if he finds out the truth, he'll be devastated beyond recovery.

t_ch: 那位科员内心可脆弱了，我们又不是为了取笑他才做了这么多的调查。
t_en: That researcher is a little soft on the inside. And we didn't do all of this investigating just so we could mock him for it, right?

t_ch: 你可真是残忍。
t_en: That's pretty brutal of you.

t_ch: 这种事情让那个「狐仙」开口，比我们俩在旁边苦口婆心有用多了。
t_en: I think a message from the Foxian Beauty will do much more good than our talking and explaining.

t_ch: 你要是觉得残忍的话，也许你可以让那位「狐仙」说得温柔一些？
t_en: If you think it's brutal, maybe you can ask the Foxian Beauty to convey her sentiments more gently?

t_ch: …这点小事，要不我自己去联系吧，就不麻烦你了。
t_en: Actually, there's no reason to trouble you with such a trivial errand. I'll handle this one myself.

t_ch: 不过要是有跟他心意相通的狐人女孩儿愿意跟他交往倒也不错，我倒是可以考虑考虑仙舟外驻的事情。
t_en: You know, maybe there is a foxian lady out there who would be a good match for him. Perhaps I should seriously consider transferring him to a post at Xianzhou.

t_ch: 长生种和短生种不会有好结局。
t_en: It is ill-fated for a long-life species to be bonded with a short-life species.

t_ch: 我听说过，不过嘛，在我看来那只是一种逃避的借口。
t_en: I have heard as much. But I think that's just an excuse people tell themselves.

t_ch: 以我的观点来看，时间的长短不足评价爱情的质量，毕竟这里是宇宙呀。
t_en: The way I see it, the love between two people isn't less valuable because life is short. After all, everything is short-lived compared to the universe.

t_ch: 你可真是一个体贴的好站长啊。
t_en: You are indeed a thoughtful Lead Researcher.

t_ch: 啊，关心科员们的起居生活，也是代理站长的职责嘛。
t_en: Well, what else can I do? Watching out for my fellow researchers is part of the job.

t_ch: 哎，你就别在这里恭维我了。
t_en: Anyway, I'm not the one who deserves the credit here.

t_ch: 多亏了你，事情算是告一段落了，拿好，这是我答应给你的报酬。
t_en: Thanks to you, we can consider this little saga over. Take this, it's what I promised you.

t_ch: 这个叫「黛青」的骗子聊天的话术也不高明啊。温符瑞科员到底是怎么能被迷得茶不思饭不想的？
t_en: Now that I think about it, this "Daiqing" scammer had horrendous conversational skills. How did Wen Furui fall head over heels for someone of such low caliber?

t_ch: 「在这茫茫银河中，我们和许多人相识、相知」……咳咳。
t_en: In the midst of the boundless cosmos, we meet and get to know so many people... *sigh*

t_ch: 我强忍的，这算工伤吧？
t_en: After all I've been through, am I eligible for worker comp?

t_ch: 我会为你申请空间站心理创伤医疗补贴的。
t_en: I'll send in a worker compensation claim for you at the station for psychological trauma.

t_ch: 我其实不太会聊天…
t_en: I'm not such a great conversationalist myself...

t_ch: 哪里的话。你装作不谙世事的{F#小女生}{M#小男生}聊的很棒！
t_en: Oh come on! You play the "naive {F#girl}{M#boy}" part like a natural!

t_ch: 我竟然有一些心动。
t_en: That would be nice.

t_ch: 如果是赛博诈骗的话，接下应该很快就会用各种理由来骗你花钱了。
t_en: If you get cyber fraud messages, they'll use every trick in the book to get you to spend money as quickly as possible.

t_ch: 我怕自己会心甘情愿地上当。
t_en: I'm afraid I might easily fall for such tricks.

t_ch: …那不是正好吗？
t_en: ...Wouldn't that be the perfect strategy though?

t_ch: 我一向有反诈骗的警惕意识。
t_en: I have always been vigilant about guarding myself against scammers.

t_ch: …你先把你的反诈骗意识关闭咯。
t_en: You'll need to turn off your anti-scam vigilance.

t_ch: 我不是仙舟的地衡司，我不会「防止你上当」…我的目的是揭穿「美丽狐仙聊天」的真面目，确保科员登上仙舟有健康安全的工作生活。
t_en: I'm not a member of Xianzhou's Realm-Keeping Commission, so I'm not going to "prevent you from getting scammed." My goal is to uncover the true nature of the Foxian Beauty Chat and ensure that my fellow researchers have a healthy and safe working environment in Xianzhou.

t_ch: 你不仅要被骗，还要被骗得很惨，这样我们才能接近真相。诈骗犯想要的只是钱而已。你们的损失，我的零花钱应该足够给你们报销…唔，绰绰有余了。
t_en: Not only do you have to get scammed, you have to get scammed badly enough for us to get closer to the truth. All the scammers want is money. My pocket change should be enough to reimburse you for your losses... more than enough, in fact.

t_ch: 要是她真的是来骗钱的，我们也好让温符瑞科员彻底放弃幻想。所以，你理解了吗？
t_en: If the Foxian Beauty is just scamming people for money, then we should help Wen Furui let go of his delusions for good. You would agree, no?

t_ch: 啊，她又来联系你了。
t_en: Oh, so she's contacting you.

t_ch: 嘻嘻，这土到令人颤抖的发言，得亏你能忍住和她聊下去。
t_en: Ah! Her messages are so cringy! Can't believe that you managed to endure them to the end.

t_ch: …呃，没有装吗？
t_en: Uh, you weren't pretending?

t_ch: 明白了。我就当这是人类多样性的一种证明了。
t_en: I see. I'll take it as a testament to the diversity of humankind.

t_ch: 记住喽，是用我的钱，所以别客气。
t_en: Remember, it's on my dime, so don't be coy about it.

t_ch: 听艾丝妲的说法，先去之前见过经纪人的地方找找吧。
t_en: Based on what Asta said, I should start by searching around the spot where we first encountered the manager.

t_ch: 这样做会有什么意义吗？
t_en: Is there any point in doing that though?

t_ch: 「美丽狐仙聊天服务」的线下工作人员就在星槎海，接头暗号是<color=#dbc291ff>「尘寰相见，好礼相送」</color>。
t_en: The in-person operation for the "Foxian Beauty Chat Service" is located in Starskiff Haven, and the pass phrase is <color=#dbc291ff>"Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond."</color>

t_ch: 那么问题来了，到底谁才是线下工作人员呢？简直是胡闹。
t_en: So the question is, who exactly is this in-person operative? What a hot mess.

t_ch: 你怎么还在这里啊？
t_en: Why are you still here?

t_ch: 那个狐仙提出要和你见一面，你就去嘛，真相只差一步了。
t_en: The Foxian Beauty has offered to meet with you. The truth is only one step away now, so you may as well accept the offer.

t_ch: 有进展之后再告诉我吧。
t_en: Let me know if there are any new developments.

t_ch: 我就待在这里，跑不了的。
t_en: I've nowhere to run, so I'll just stay put.

t_ch: 求求你，别告诉他们我就是「狐仙黛青」。
t_en: Please, don't tell them that I am the Foxian Beauty Daiqing.

t_ch: …不需要推销。
t_en: ...I don't need to hear any of your sales pitches.

t_ch: 卖古董啊卖异星科技啊，还有「你现在幸福吗？」之类的，我不需要。
t_en: I don't need any of your antiques, technology from other worlds, or any of that "Are you happy right now?" nonsense.

t_ch: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
t_en: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

t_ch: 什么新型推销…你要是再过来，我就要向地衡司报警了。
t_en: I've had enough of your "innovative" marketing strategies... If you try it again, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

t_ch: 「你现在幸福吗？」
t_en: Are you happy right now?

t_ch: 我很幸福！你再不走，我现在就要向地衡司报警了！
t_en: I'm very happy, thank you! And if you don't leave in ten seconds, I'm going to report you to the Realm-Keeping Commission!

t_ch: 汪！
t_en: Woof!

t_ch: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
t_en: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

t_ch: 汪汪！
t_en: Woof Woof!

t_ch: 与这只机巧犬对视的片刻，你从它又圆又亮的眼睛里品出了一丝好奇。
t_en: For a few brief moments you exchange glances with this ingenium dog, and you see a hint of curiosity in its bright, round eyes.

t_ch: 快件在「流云渡分拣中心」完成交接，准备发往「收件人」。
t_en: The item has been received at the Cloudford Sorting Center, and is ready to be sent on to its recipient.

t_ch: 等等，怎么是一个男人在签收快递？
t_en: Hang on — why is a man signing for this?

t_ch: 你又在四处张望什么？
t_en: Why are you looking around?

t_ch: 你来得正好，{NICKNAME}。我有件事想向你打听打听。
t_en: You came at a good time, {NICKNAME}. There's something I want to ask you.

t_ch: 有消息说，最近鳞渊境洞天里巨响如雷，是发生什么大事了吗？
t_en: I heard there has been thunderous noise coming from Scalegorge Waterscape recently. Has something big happened?

t_ch: 你又打算利用我调查什么？
t_en: Are you asking me to investigate something again?

t_ch: 什么话，我只是纯粹对罗浮上的事情好奇罢了。何况，咱们俩难道不是互惠互利的忘年交嘛？
t_en: Nothing of that sort. I'm just curious about the happenings on the Luofu. Besides, aren't we close friends who help each other out?

t_ch: 我也不知道喔！
t_en: I have no clue!

t_ch: 你的表情可不是这么说的。
t_en: That's not what I gather from your face.

t_ch: 看来，之前帮助老夫进行的研究让你感到不安了？我以博识尊的名义起誓，你贡献的调查成果，绝不会用在任何有违道义的地方！
t_en: Looks like you are quite perturbed after helping with my research last time. I swear, on Nous's name, that your investigation will not be used immorally!

t_ch: 那么，言归正传，能不能跟我讲讲鳞渊境里发生的事情？
t_en: Back to the topic, could you tell me what happened in Scalegorge Waterscape?

t_ch: 你简单讲述了自己的经历…
t_en: You talk about your experience briefly...

t_ch: 龙尊的转世重回故地，分海引涛？光是听你说这么几句，就有种身临其境目眩神迷的感受了。
t_en: The reincarnated high elder has returned to his homeland, parted the sea, and stirred the waves? Just hearing you say these gives me a vivid image. It's as if I were there.

t_ch: 打从我攻读仙舟文明史专业开始，就一直向往着来罗浮仙舟亲眼瞧瞧那些著述里提到的胜景了。
t_en: Since I started studying the history of Xianzhou civilization, I have been longing to visit the famous sites on the Luofu mentioned in the books.

t_ch: 可惜的很，阿基维利消失后，星轨航路也渐渐变得不再稳定，世界与世界的距离越发遥远。学会也渐渐不像过去那般对仙舟狂热了。
t_en: It's a shame that the star rail has become unstable since the disappearance of Akivili. The worlds are getting further and further away from each other, and the Guild has gradually lost interest in the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 我的老师，贝尼尼一生热爱仙舟文化，他曾经写信向我描述过鳞渊境中奇异的生态和充满生命力的水体。
t_en: My teacher, Bernini, was a fan of Xianzhou culture all his life. He once wrote to me, describing the peculiar ecology in Scalegorge Waterscape and the water that was full of vitality.

t_ch: 可惜，文化研究从来都是冷门领域，没有亮眼的成果就意味着没有经费。到最后，老师羞于见人，再也没有回学会任教，不知去哪儿高就了。
t_en: Unfortunately, cultural study has always been a niche thing. Without an impressive result, a study would not be funded. In the end, my teacher never returned to his teaching post out of embarrassment and left to work elsewhere.

t_ch: 唉，而我呢，我是个庸碌的蠢材。我畏惧老师的结局，所以把前半生都浪费在那些更容易得到名声和利益的课题上，临老了才重拾初心，来到这儿。
t_en: As for me, I'm just a mediocre and untalented person. In fear of ending up the same way as my teacher, I've wasted most of my life on things that would quickly get me rich and famous. Now that I'm getting older, I have decided to stay true to myself and come here.

t_ch: 帮帮我，{NICKNAME}。老夫想在自己这把老骨头彻底动弹不得前，能继承自己老师的遗志，看看鳞渊境的奇景。
t_en: Help me, {NICKNAME}. I want to complete what was left unfinished by my teacher and witness the beautiful Scalegorge Waterscape before I am too old to walk.

t_ch: 啊，当然了，你可以想想再答复我。这一回我不打算再说什么优厚的报酬之类的屁话，我明白，开出这市侩的条件就是在侮辱一个无名客。
t_en: Of course, you can take some time to think it over. This time, I won't promise you a handsome pay, as I understand the offer is humiliating to a Nameless.

t_ch: 毕竟咱俩身上有着相同的勇气，学士研究未知，而无名客奔向未知。对吧？
t_en: After all, both of us have the same kind of courage. While we scholars study the unknown, the Nameless pursue the unknown, right?

t_ch: 语速急促的演讲一下子让陶德喘不上气，他开始艰难地喘息，等待你做出决定。
t_en: Todd gets breathless after speaking too fast. He waits for your decision while catching his breath.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，帮帮老陶德的事情，你考虑的怎么样了？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, have you decided whether to help me?

t_ch: 行吧，我答应了。
t_en: Fine, I'll help you.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，用仙舟人的话该怎么表达呢？真是「铭感五内」啊！
t_en: Hahaha, how should I express my gratitude in the Xianzhou language? I'll forever be "in your debt"!

t_ch: 我才发现咱俩都不是仙舟人…算了。
t_en: I just realized neither of us are from Xianzhou. Forget it.

t_ch: 还是用优厚报酬侮辱我吧…
t_en: Please humiliate me with a handsome pay...

t_ch: 成交，{NICKNAME}。要说我怎么会对你一见如故呢，你身上充满了学会崇尚的品质——实用主义、实用主义、还是实用主义。
t_en: It's a deal, {NICKNAME}. No wonder I feel so close to you though we've just met. You're the embodiment of the quality that the Guild reveres — pragmatism!

t_ch: 抱歉，让我再挣扎一下…
t_en: I'm sorry. I need more time to think about it...

t_ch: 没问题，没问题。
t_en: No problem.

t_ch: 人生嘛，百分之八十是花在等待上，老夫已经等了很久很久啦，不在乎多等那么一点儿时间。
t_en: Well, life is all about waiting. Since I've already waited for so long, I don't mind waiting a little longer.

t_ch: 不过如果你愿意考虑，请抓紧一点儿。在生命的户头上，老夫的存额已经所剩不多啦。
t_en: Still, please don't make me wait too long. I'm afraid I don't have too much time left.

t_ch: 那么，我们谈谈调查本身吧。
t_en: Now, let's talk about the investigation.

t_ch: 我想写一份综述性的报告，讨论鳞渊境的变化，还有龙尊传承制度的得失。当然，这些需要最新的资料。一如既往地……
t_en: I'd like to compose a report discussing the changes in Scalegorge Waterscape and the pros and cons of the high elder succession system. For this, I need the latest information. As usual...

t_ch: …需要我去跑腿？
t_en: ...You need me to run errands for you?

t_ch: …你无法亲临实地调查？
t_en: ...Can't you do the investigation yourself on-site?

t_ch: 是的，是的。但请不要把这当作是一种推诿辛苦劳动的借口。
t_en: Yes, but please don't get the wrong idea that I'm trying to avoid physical work.

t_ch: 关节炎先生最近加紧了折磨我的脚步。没有医用外骨骼的辅助，我迈出的每一步都像是在铺满碎玻璃的道路上跪着前进。
t_en: Mr. Arthritis has been giving me a hard time whenever I walk. Without the help of the medical exoskeleton, I feel like I'm stepping on glass with every stride I make.

t_ch: 说回正题，老师的信里提到过，他在鳞渊境见过一些持明族的古迹。比如<color=#dbc291ff>供奉「龙尊」的雕像</color>，还有不少精美的<color=#dbc291ff>历史壁画</color>，这些都是持明历史的见证。
t_en: Anyway, my teacher mentioned that he had sighted some Vidyadhara monuments in Scalegorge Waterscape in his letters. For example, <color=#dbc291ff>the statue dedicated to the high elder</color> and many beautiful <color=#dbc291ff>historical murals</color>. These bore witness to the Vidyadhara history.

t_ch: 他说自己还见到了沉睡在水底的<color=#dbc291ff>持明卵</color>，我不知道他到底用什么法子钻进海里了？难不成他也能分开海水？开个玩笑，他多半是穿上了潜水服。
t_en: He also told me that he had seen a sunken <color=#dbc291ff>Vidyadhara egg</color> underwater. I wonder how he got into the sea. Could he have controlled the water and moved it away? Just kidding. He must have worn a diving suit.

t_ch: 最后好像还有个…呃，嗯…我很难描述的东西。他说那是一道<color=#dbc291ff>「龙形的光芒」</color>？是指「不朽」之龙留给后裔的神迹吗？
t_en: The last thing he saw was... umm... quite hard to describe. He said it was a <color=#dbc291ff>dragon-shaped ray of light</color>. Could it have been a miracle left behind by Long the Permanence for their descendants?

t_ch: 总之，你要是见着这些东西，请务必拍张照带给我瞧瞧。我打算把这些佐证资料加入论述报告中。当然，你也会以联名作者的名义在报告上署名。
t_en: Anyway, if you see any of those things, please take a picture and show it to me. I'll attach these supporting documents to my report. Of course, I'll make you the co-author.

t_ch: 鳞渊境，鳞渊境…贝尼尼老师到底看到了什么样的奇景呢？
t_en: Scalegorge Waterscape... What kind of spectacle did Bernini see?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}啊，你好。照片的事就拜托你了。
t_en: Hi, {NICKNAME}. I'm counting on you for the pictures.

t_ch: （陶德想看的是龙尊雕像，在这儿附近找找看吧……）
t_en: (Todd wants to see the high elder statue. I'll look for it in this area...)

t_ch: （丹恒，呃不，丹恒的前世，呃不，丹恒前世的前世的前世…留下的文物。真是认识了个了不得的朋友啊。）
t_en: (This is an artifact left by Dan Heng... Errr, no, by Dan Heng's previous incarnation... Errr, actually, by his previous incarnation's previous incarnation... Seems I've made a remarkable friend indeed.)

t_ch: （上面的内容似乎具有某种连续性…看来这就是陶德所说的，记载持明族历史的壁画了。）
t_en: (There's a continuity in the story... Looks like this is the mural that records the Vidyadhara history that Todd mentioned.)

t_ch: 照片拍好了。
t_en: I took the pictures.

t_ch: 太好了，让我瞧瞧！
t_en: Fantastic! Let me have a look!

t_ch: 陶德接收了你拍摄的照片，一张一张细细端详。
t_en: Todd takes the pictures from you and scrutinizes them one by one.

t_ch: 抱歉，要让你在一边稍等了…上了年纪，视力和分辨颜色的能力也衰弱了。
t_en: I'm sorry for keeping you waiting... As we get older, we can't see and tell colors apart that well.

t_ch: 原来如此，这些景色和老师信里说的一模一样啊。要是能早些欣赏到这片壮丽的……
t_en: These views look exactly the same as those described by my teacher. If only I could have admired them earlier...

t_ch: 唔？等等，这个发亮的痕迹是…？我没看错吧，这不是学会的内部标记吗？
t_en: Huh? Hold on. What's this shiny mark? Are my eyes failing me? Isn't it a marking of the Guild?

t_ch: 我拍摄时没看到有标记啊…
t_en: I didn't notice it when I took the pictures...

t_ch: 噢，这是博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。
t_en: Oh, this is a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.

t_ch: 照片有什么问题吗？
t_en: Is there a problem with the pictures?

t_ch: 不，没什么问题，恰恰相反，你拍到了一些有意思的东西。我本以为能通过照片看看这些景色已经是极大的幸运了。
t_en: No, there's no problem at all. On the contrary, you captured something interesting. I thought I was lucky enough to be able to see these views through the pictures.

t_ch: 但其中一张照片上，我找到了博识学会内部人员才会使用的特殊光学标识。这代表着某位学士抵达此处进行研究，并为同行留下了一些线索。
t_en: In one of the pictures, I noticed a special optical marking used only by the members of the Intelligentsia Guild. It shows that a scholar has done research at that particular location and left some clues for his or her peers.

t_ch: 我收下照片时，学会的处理程序自动进行了辨识，竟然能有这样意外的收获，哈哈。
t_en: It was automatically detected by the processing program of the Guild when I received the pictures. What an unexpected and pleasant surprise, haha.

t_ch: 这是你留下的记号吗？贝尼尼老师，你还真有行动力啊。
t_en: Did you leave this marking, Bernini? You really were driven.

t_ch: 你肯定这是你老师的记号？
t_en: Are you sure this is your master's marking?

t_ch: 做学问这么些年，我唯一肯定的就是不敢肯定。
t_en: After all these years of being a scholar, the only thing I am certain of is that nothing is certain.

t_ch: 不过这想来也是顺理成章的事情。毕竟研究热潮早过了，派往仙舟进行文化交流的学者寥寥无几。
t_en: But that's a logical explanation. After all, the research hype has long gone, and very few scholars are sent to Xianzhou for cultural exchange.

t_ch: 涂鸦古迹，不文明！
t_en: It's uncivilized to vandalize a historical monument!

t_ch: 容我解释一下，如果一种光学涂料无腐蚀、无毒害，且只能被学会的装置辨识。我个人更喜欢把这种行为称为「保护遗迹」。
t_en: Please let me explain. If it is an optical paint that is non-corrosive, harmless, and can only be detected by a device of the Guild, I'd personally call it "protecting history."

t_ch: 因为留下这些记号，就能提醒武装考古学派的笨蛋，别把遗迹给炸上天。
t_en: These markings serve as reminders for those moronic Armed Archaeologists, so they won't blow up the historical sites.

t_ch: 留下这些记号做什么？
t_en: What's the purpose of leaving these markings?

t_ch: 老夫也不知道啊。不过既然留下了标识，就意味着线索和指示。贝尼尼老师发现了什么呢？
t_en: I have no idea. Since they were left there, they're meant to be clues. What did Bernini discover?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我打算循着这条线索，看看贝尼尼老师留下了什么。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, I'm going to follow this lead and see what Bernini has left behind.

t_ch: 是「差遣我去看看」…
t_en: You mean "you'll send me there to see"...

t_ch: 哈哈哈，你还真是促狭啊。没错，是拜托你去瞧瞧。
t_en: Hahaha, what a nitpicker you are. That's right. I'll need you to check it out for me.

t_ch: 当然你如果执意想让我亲临现场，我也很乐意。只是恐怕你没法接受自己背着我进行考察吧？
t_en: Well, if you insist on me being there myself, I'd be more than willing to oblige. However, I'm afraid you can't accept the idea of carrying me on your back when doing the investigation.

t_ch: 我就知道事情不会那么简单。
t_en: I knew it wouldn't be so simple.

t_ch: 啊，这就是研究。以一句「为什么」开始，以一句「我就知道事情不会这么简单」结束……
t_en: Ah, this is what research is like. It starts with a "why" and ends with an "I knew it wouldn't be so simple"...

t_ch: 我会把学会的识别插件装在你的手机里，这样你就能识别到这种标记，并且把它拍摄下来——咳，按考古领域说法，也许该叫「拓印」，光学拓印。
t_en: I'll install the Guild's detection plug-in to your phone. That way, you'll be able to recognize the markings and take pictures of them... Ahem, in terms of archaeology, it should probably be called "optical rubbing."

t_ch: 贝尼尼老师信件里的描述，提到过几个他曾去的地方，我在地图上把它们的位置全都标出来了。
t_en: Bernini mentioned several places he had visited in the letters. I've marked them out on the map for you.

t_ch: 你带上手机去那边，只要附近有学会标识的反射信号，插件就会发出提示。找准标记的位置，把它「拓印」下来就行。够简单吧？
t_en: Just bring your phone with you. The plug-in will issue a notification if the reflection signal of a nearby marking is detected. Your job is to locate the marking and make a rubbing of it. Easy-peasy, right?

t_ch: 讲解完毕，出发吧。
t_en: That's all. You may set off now.

t_ch: 怎么了，{NICKNAME}？需要老夫再讲解一遍这次的考察目标吗？
t_en: Is there a problem, {NICKNAME}? Should I explain the objectives of this investigation again?

t_ch: 好啊。
t_en: Sure.

t_ch: 老夫已经在地图上标出了几个地方，这些可能是我的老师贝尼尼考察过的地方。
t_en: I've marked out several points on the map. They are the places where Bernini may have investigated.

t_ch: 我把识别插件给你装上啦，所以不必担心摸不着头脑，只要去那儿转一圈，它会提示你哪儿留有学会的标识。
t_en: I've installed the plug-in for you so you won't be lost. Just walk around the place, and the plug-in will tell you where to look for the markings.

t_ch: 你只要举起相机，咔嚓一下，把它拍下来给我就行。
t_en: Your job is to hold the camera and snap pictures of the markings.

t_ch: 不必了。
t_en: No, thank you.

t_ch: 我就知道你足够机灵，听一遍就会。
t_en: I knew you were smart enough to get what I meant right away.

t_ch: 出发吧，{NICKNAME}。贝尼尼老师到底在那儿留下了什么呢？真是教人期待。
t_en: Set off now, {NICKNAME}. I wonder what Bernini left behind. I can't wait to find out.

t_ch: 请注意，侦测到特定反应，附近存在学会通行光学标识，所属学士：贝尼尼•赛拉诺。
t_en: Note: Specific response detected. An optical marking of the guild is nearby. Owner: Scholar Bernini Serrano.

t_ch: 开启「精准识别」模式。
t_en: Enable the Precise Recognition mode.

t_ch: 「精准识别」模式已开启，请及时拍摄、记忆、提取…或已任何现有手段保存信息。
t_en: Precise Recognition enabled. Please save the information timely by taking pictures, memorizing, extracting, or by any other existing means.

t_ch: 我拿到丹鼎司的标记拓片了。
t_en: I've got the rubbings of the Alchemy Commission's markings.

t_ch: 让我瞧瞧，你在建筑上拍到了一个复杂的图形？还是通过拼接形式识别出来的？
t_en: Let me take a look. Did you find this complex shape on a building, or was it pieced together by the plug-in?

t_ch: 这…的确是贝尼尼老师的手笔。
t_en: This... is indeed the handiwork of Bernini.

t_ch: 陶德翻动着你提供的「拓片」，枯瘦的喉结上下翻滚，猛然咳了起来。
t_en: As Todd is fiddling with the rubbing you provided, his withered Adam's apple moves up and down before he starts coughing vigorously.

t_ch: 咳咳，有意思。这些纹样似乎是在描绘某个仙舟历史的重要时刻。
t_en: *coughs* Interesting. These motifs seem to depict a significant historical moment in Xianzhou.

t_ch: 瞧瞧这张，一个有着多条手臂的神明形象，背后有枝杈冉冉生长，它描绘的是……
t_en: Look at this. It's a depiction of a deity figure with multiple arms and branches growing behind. It portrays...

t_ch: 药师的降临。
t_en: The advent of Yaoshi.

t_ch: 你很熟悉仙舟历史嘛。对于非专业人士来说，这也许只是一张无意义的图样罢了。但内行的人自然了解它想表达的意义。
t_en: You're pretty well-versed in Xianzhou history. This might be an image without any special meaning for a layperson, but a professional can surely understand its meaning.

t_ch: 你还真会看图说话。
t_en: I must say you're very good at making up stories.

t_ch: 这个「拓片」描绘的是丰饶之主为仙舟赐下建木的瞬间。
t_en: This rubbing depicts the moment when the Abundance bestowed the Ambrosial Arbor upon Xianzhou.

t_ch: 陶德压低声音，看了看四周，仿佛在确认自己说的话没有被人听见。
t_en: Todd lowers his voice and looks around as though to make sure not a single soul can hear him.

t_ch: 这绝不是我在胡诌。内行的人自然能看懂图案意义，但对于从未接触过知识的人而言，这只是一张无意义的图样罢了。
t_en: I'm not making this up. A professional can understand its meaning, but for those without the knowledge, this is just a meaningless drawing.

t_ch: 看看这张，一名勇士弯弓搭箭，将一株巨木射穿。它很显然是在描绘那个脍炙人口的帝弓神话——「巡猎」斫断了建木。
t_en: Look at this drawing. A warrior bends his bow and shoots at an enormous tree. It's clearly about The Hunt chopping off the Ambrosial Arbor — a well-known myth about the Reignbow Arbiter.

t_ch: 但这副图样倒没有将射穿建木的功劳归于神明，而是描绘了一个普通人类的形象…有意思。
t_en: Yet, instead of crediting the deed to the deity, a regular human form is drawn instead... Interesting.

t_ch: 如果这些图样描绘了仙舟历史的重要阶段，那么它一定不止三个。{NICKNAME}，接下来咱们可以深入探一探鳞渊境。老师去过那儿，一定留下了其他痕迹。
t_en: If these drawings are about the important moments in Xianzhou history, there must be more than three. {NICKNAME}, let's go deeper into Scalegorge Waterscape and explore. Since my master went there before, he must have left some other clues.

t_ch: 如果有什么发现，务必把它带给我瞧瞧。至于眼下……
t_en: If you find anything, please show me. As for now...

t_ch: 陶德的自动笔记随着他的触碰开始迅速录入信息。
t_en: Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.

t_ch: 对了，拿好这个，这是我对这些图样的解读。虽然篇幅不多，但老夫觉得这东西可以扩展成一份不错的仙舟历史报告。
t_en: By the way, please take this. You can find my interpretation on the drawings inside. Although it isn't much, it's got potential to be made into a good Xianzhou history report.

t_ch: 剩下的拓片都在这儿了。
t_en: All the remaining rubbings are here.

t_ch: 真的没有了？你把我标出来的地方全都找遍了？没有标出来的呢？
t_en: Are you sure? Did you do a thorough search in the locations I marked? What about those I didn't mark?

t_ch: 真的一张也没有了！
t_en: There's no more left!

t_ch: 陶德的自动笔记随着他触碰开始迅速录入信息。
t_en: Todd's auto-note starts taking down information rapidly upon his touch.

t_ch: 这张图样上，一位威严庄重的上位者伸出手，许多船只启航…这想必是在讲述仙舟出航的古老历史。
t_en: In this drawing, an authoritative and solemn superior extends his arm to the air as fleets of ships set sail... This must be a depiction of Xianzhou's departure from ancient history.

t_ch: 而这个，一个浑身抽枝发芽的人形…显然这是在描绘魔阴身的形象。最近咱们应该都有见识过它带来的恐怖。这恐怕也是仙舟人逃离死亡后支付的代价……
t_en: And this, a figure covered in sprouts... This is obviously a drawing of someone stricken with mara. I believe all of us have witnessed how scary the disease is recently. I'm afraid that's the price the Xianzhou people must pay for escaping death.

t_ch: 而这一张图，许多人形汇聚在一起引导浪涛，淹没巨树。想来应该是描绘了持明族对罗浮的贡献……
t_en: And this drawing shows a group of people summoning waves to drown an enormous tree. I suppose this illustrates the contribution of the Vidyadhara to the Luofu...

t_ch: 一、二、三、四、五…再算上之前你找到的三个。虽然顺序凌乱，但这八个图样几乎囊括了仙舟从古至今的重要神话或历史。不过，真奇怪啊……
t_en: One, two, three, four, five... and the three you have previously found. Although they aren't in order, the eight drawings almost cover all the significant myths or history of Xianzhou from the past to the present. Still, there's something odd...

t_ch: 怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: 学会对仙舟历史有系统的记录，虽然也有魔阴身这般被极力隐藏的秘密……
t_en: The Guild has a systemic way of recording Xianzhou history. Indeed, there are secrets like the mara-struck that are kept well-hidden.

t_ch: 不过说到底，这些神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些图样留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
t_en: Still, these myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?

t_ch: 是啊，真奇怪…
t_en: That's really odd...

t_ch: 你也发现了吗？除去「魔阴身」这一张所描绘的可怕景象一直被仙舟人着力淡化和隐藏……
t_en: Have you noticed it, too? Besides the scary drawing about the mara-struck, a condition the Xianzhou people have been downplaying and hiding desperately...

t_ch: 这些图样描绘的神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些为人所知的信息留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
t_en: The other myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?

t_ch: 是因为自己始终只能找到毫无价值的研究结果而失心疯了？还是其中另有深意？…让我好好想想。
t_en: Did he lose his mind because his research was fruitless? Or is there more to this than meets the eye? Let me think about this.

t_ch: 你们学士的心眼可真多啊…
t_en: You scholars are so convoluted...

t_ch: …有什么想法写下来不就好了么？
t_en: ...Why don't you all just write down what you think?

t_ch: 你说的…很对，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: You are... right, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 呵呵，哈哈哈哈…我竟然被如此简单的障眼法给骗住了。
t_en: Hehe, hahahaha... I can't believe I was fooled by such simple trickery.

t_ch: 与平日衰老的样子不同，老头以惊人的速度开始专心处理起这些图案来，不时发出梦呓般的自言自语。
t_en: Unlike his usual tired and old self, the elderly man starts sorting out the drawings at an astonishing speed. In the meantime, he can be heard muttering to himself like a sleep talker's ramblings.

t_ch: 半晌，陶德从沉迷中回过神来，激动地细喘起来。
t_en: After some time, Todd snaps out of his trance and starts gasping in agitation.

t_ch: 呼…呼…我…我完全明白了。
t_en: Huff... Huff... I... I understand it now.

t_ch: 你明白了什么？
t_en: What do you understand?

t_ch: 你理解了老师的意思？
t_en: Have you figured out what your teacher meant?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你说什么？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, what did you say?

t_ch: 咳，抱歉，我刚刚太专注于解读了。人上了年纪，反应都会变得迟钝起来。
t_en: *coughs* Sorry about that. I was too concentrated on the interpretation. When you start aging, your reactions start to become slow.

t_ch: 所以你明白了什么？
t_en: So, what do you understand?

t_ch: 我想，贝尼尼学士之所以画下这些人尽皆知的历史，当然是为了告诉后来的学士，在仙舟已追寻不到任何有价值的秘密。
t_en: It seems to me that Bernini drew the well-known historical events because he wanted to tell the other scholars that Xianzhou no longer bore any secrets worth pursuing.

t_ch: 他可能被这趟一无所获的旅行重重打击到了，也许当他得知「魔阴身」的存在时，彻底对仙舟长生种的命运产生了幻灭。
t_en: The futile trip might have dealt a devastating blow to him. Perhaps, all his hopes for the fate of Xianzhou's long-life species were dashed when he learned about the mara-struck's existence.

t_ch: 所以，他画下这些图案，然后放弃了自己的学术生命，再也没有回学会任教。
t_en: So, he drew these drawings, gave up on his career as a scholar, and decided never to return to his teaching post at the Guild.

t_ch: 我想去一趟鳞渊境，凭吊一下我的老师。{NICKNAME}，我的朋友，你能为我引路吗？
t_en: I'd like to visit Scalegorge Waterscape to pay respects to my teacher. {NICKNAME}, my friend, could you be my guide?

t_ch: 现在？
t_en: Now?

t_ch: 可以是今天，也可以是明天，为什么不能是现在呢？
t_en: We can go later or tomorrow, but why not now?

t_ch: 眼下的鳞渊境可不安全…
t_en: Scalegorge Waterscape isn't safe at the moment...

t_ch: 不安全，这不要紧！当然，如果身边能有个武装考古学派的人陪着会更安全些。
t_en: It doesn't matter! Of course, it'll be safer if we have the escort of an Armed Archaeologist.

t_ch: 但我想你也一样胜任，不是吗？毕竟你都顺利带回了拓片。
t_en: I guess you can protect me too, no? After all, you have brought back the rubbings safely.

t_ch: 关节炎先生不折磨你了？
t_en: Has Mr. Arthritis stopped giving you a hard time?

t_ch: 没有，半点都不消停。但我还是得亲自去到那边，以表郑重。
t_en: No, he's never spared me. Still, I must be there myself to show my respect.

t_ch: 是贝尼尼学士将我带上了这条道路，也是他向学会举荐我，让我正式成为了一名学士。如果不能再见到他，我想走一遍他走过的路。
t_en: Bernini led me to this career and made me an official scholar with his recommendation. Since I can never see him again, I'd like to walk the path he walked before.

t_ch: 行，咱们走吧。
t_en: Alright. Let's go.

t_ch: 在走远路前，先让我吃片镇痛药。
t_en: Let me take a painkiller first before the long journey.

t_ch: 陶德颤颤巍巍地从药盒里取出一枚药片，艰难吞了下去。片刻后，他被疼痛折磨的苦脸明显舒展了开来。
t_en: Todd takes out a pill from a pillbox with his trembling hand and struggles to swallow it. A while later, his face distorted by pain looks more relaxed.

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 唔，龙尊雕像么？亲眼所见，真是胜过照片百倍。
t_en: Oh, is that the high elder statue? Nothing beats seeing it in person.

t_ch: 老师提到过，传说中持明龙尊受秘法加持，除了能自在变化龙形外，其容貌也万世不改。
t_en: According to my teacher, the legendary Vidyadhara high elder is empowered by a secret spell. Not only can the high elder transform into the dragon form at will, but their appearance will also never change.

t_ch: …唉，看看这张年轻的脸啊，不知愁苦，不落尘埃。
t_en: ...Alas, look at how youthful the high elder looks. Without trouble and without hardship.

t_ch: 你的老师见过龙尊吗？
t_en: Did your teacher ever meet the high elder?
